class.name: ASEffectRequirement
class.description:
ASEffectRequirement defines conditions that must be met for an effect to activate or apply. Typically used for attribute-based requirements like minimum health levels, resource thresholds, or stat checks.
Used by ASEffect to specify activation conditions and by the effect system to validate whether requirements are satisfied before applying effects to targets.
Requirements are evaluated during effect activation and can be combined with tag-based requirements for complex activation logic.

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the requirement to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads requirement data from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: The name of the attribute to check for this requirement.
The required amount/threshold value for the attribute.
